notes_md:
**quan tâm** = to care about, to pay attention to someone/something.

It’s a verb. You use it when you show care, concern, or interest in a person, situation, or issue. It often has an emotional meaning (care about someone) but can also mean simply paying attention.


Close synonyms: **chăm sóc** (take care of, more physical/action-based), **để ý** (notice/pay attention, lighter).  
Opposite idea: **bỏ mặc** (ignore, neglect).
notes:
quan tâm = to care about, to pay attention to someone/something.

It’s a verb. You use it when you show care, concern, or interest in a person, situation, or issue. It often has an emotional meaning (care about someone) but can also mean simply paying attention.

Close synonyms: chăm sóc (take care of, more physical/action-based), để ý (notice/pay attention, lighter).  
Opposite idea: bỏ mặc (ignore, neglect).
exampleSentencesTranslated: She always shows care about her family's health.
Can you care about my feelings more?
Good friends care when I have difficulties.

definitions.en: To show concern or interest in someone or something.
definitions.vi: Thể hiện sự quan tâm hoặc hứng thú với ai đó hoặc điều gì đó.
definitions.es: Mostrar preocupación o interés por alguien o algo.

example.vi: Tôi luôn quan tâm đến sức khỏe của mình.
example.es: Siempre me preocupo por mi salud.
example.en: I always care about my health.

exampleSentences: Chị luôn quan tâm đến sức khỏe của gia đình mình.
Anh có thể quan tâm đến cảm xúc của em nhiều hơn không?
Bạn bè tốt thường quan tâm khi mình gặp khó khăn.
